name: cities-skylines-heightmap-generator
description: *This is a fork of the original heightmap builder (JBerg60/cities-heightmap)*

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('out',{recursive:true,force:true})" && node_modules/.bin/esbuild src/app.ts --bundle --outfile=out/bundle.js --sourcemap=inline --platform=browser --target=esnext && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=['index.html','styles.css','favicon.ico'];for(const f of files){fs.copyFileSync('src/'+f,'out/'+f);}"
